_note: SKILL 1 MEASURE output. Records the state-of-the-world delta each MEASURE run. Two independent GSC surfaces feed this: (A) per-query rank monitor -> automation/.state/rank-history.json, written by net.jessetek.weekly-rank-watch via get-gsc-rank.mjs; (B) aggregate harvest -> automation/.state/gsc-harvest-*.json, written by the SEPARATE weekly-gsc-harvest scheduled task, source of goal.json baseline_kpis (total impressions/clicks). They can be alive/dark independently.

pipeline_status.rank_watch_monitor: ALIVE. net.jessetek.weekly-rank-watch fired Monday 2026-07-20 07:31 and appended fresh source=gsc entries (2026-07-20) for all 10 tracked queries into rank-history.json. This is the second successful weekly run since the 2026-07-13 restore, so the monitor's schedule is confirmed working.
pipeline_status.aggregate_harvest: STILL DARK. Newest gsc-harvest is 2026-06-01 (49d stale). weekly-gsc-harvest has NOT been restored (ledger E5, owner=jesse, in-progress). Reach KPIs (total impressions/clicks) still cannot be refreshed, which is exactly what is needed to disambiguate the all-zero rank readings below.
pipeline_status.harvester_windowing_suspect: OPEN QUESTION for E5: get-gsc-rank.mjs may query a trailing window ending at run-time; GSC's 2-3 day finalization latency would then zero-out the newest days on every run, not just once. Two consecutive Monday pulls (07-13, 07-20) both returning all-zero — including branded — is consistent with EITHER a systematic script-window bug OR genuine no-visibility. Cannot distinguish from the per-query surface alone.

reading_2026-07-20.escalation_flag: BRANDED-STILL-ZERO. The 2026-07-13 snapshot set an explicit test: if branded 'realtor jesse onate' is still 0 on the next Monday run, escalate. It IS still 0 on 2026-07-20. Threshold met. But honesty guard: this does NOT prove zero visibility. The 2026-06-01 aggregate harvest independently measured 169 impressions / 4 clicks with branded at avg pos ~2.5, so the site WAS visible 7 weeks ago. Two identical all-zero per-query pulls one week apart, with the branded term also zeroed, most likely indicate the get-gsc-rank.mjs pull is hitting an unsettled/empty GSC window every run (systematic, not a real ranking collapse). Do NOT report a ranking loss to Jesse off this signal alone.

delta_vs_2026-07-13: No change. Both Monday pulls (07-13 and 07-20) returned rank=null / impressions=0 for all 10 queries. The reading is stable but not yet trustworthy as a rank/reach measurement.
delta_vs_baseline_2026-06-01: Still no usable delta. Baseline (gsc-harvest-2026-06-01): 169 total impressions / 4 clicks / real_estate_agent avg pos 3.9 on 7 impr / realtor 4.6 / branded 2.5. Per-query zeros are not comparable to that aggregate. Reach KPIs stay pinned at their 2026-06-01 values until weekly-gsc-harvest (E5) is restored.
next_measure: DISAMBIGUATION is the priority, and it is NOT a Claude-safe auto-fix (touches launchd + get-gsc-rank.mjs windowing, owner=jesse via E5). Two paths: (1) Restore weekly-gsc-harvest (E5) so the settled-window aggregate can confirm whether branded impressions are truly gone or just window-artifacted. (2) If a future rank-watch run returns real non-zero numbers on its own, the zeros were a latency artifact and no action is needed. Until one of those resolves, treat rank readings as PIPELINE-ALIVE / DATA-UNTRUSTWORTHY. Do not keep re-snapshotting identical all-zero Monday pulls: only re-MEASURE when a reading is non-zero OR when the aggregate harvest returns.
